name: nitro-wrangler
description: Nitro module that rewrites Cloudflare output into builderless-style Wrangler bundles

scripts.test:vite: bun run build && bun run --cwd test/fixtures/app build:vite && node --test test/vite.test.mjs
scripts.test:rollup: bun run build && bun run --cwd test/fixtures/app build:rollup && node --test test/rollup.test.mjs
scripts.test:rolldown: bun run build && bun run --cwd test/fixtures/app build:rolldown && node --test test/rolldown.test.mjs
scripts.test: bun run test:rollup && bun run test:rolldown && bun run test:vite
